TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Uhuru_Kenyatta, title = Uhuru_Kenyatta, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uhuru_Kenyatta} }

S.FORM: Uhuru Kenyatta ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 10, Uhuru Kenyatta, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Kenya ta' misuw hya' ga Uhuru Kenyatta, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Uhuru Kenyatta ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 10, Uhuru Kenyatta, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Kenya ta' misuw hya' ga Uhuru Kenyatta, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: uħuru kenjatta rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, uħuru kenjatta, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw kenja taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa uħuru kenjatta, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
